recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Empire Records
recommendations.overview: The employees of an independent music store learn about each other as they try to stop the store from being absorbed by a large chain.

recommendations.title: Ghoulies
recommendations.overview: A young man and his girlfriend move into the man's old mansion home, where he becomes possessed by a need to control ancient demons.

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: War between two Irish youth gangs consists of removing and retrieving buttons from each other's clothing.

recommendations.title: Pumpkinhead II: Blood Wings
recommendations.overview: Thrill-seeking teenagers resurrect a demon from his grave and a bloody rampage for revenge begins.

recommendations.title: When Animals Dream
recommendations.overview: Teenage Marie lives on a small island with her father and catatonic mother. Virtually friendless and sullen, Marie begins to experience frightening changes in her body that mark her as a dangerous threat.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn
recommendations.overview: A psychopathic twelve-year-old girl in a small town in Nebraska recruits all the other children and goes on a bloody rampage, killing the corrupt adults and anyone else who opposes her. A bright high schooler who won't go along with the plan is the t

recommendations.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
recommendations.overview: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.
